- position: top-left → H1

This combination is F1-G2-H1, which doesn't appear explicitly in the lexicon, but all components are well-established conventions.

F1-G2-H1

Looking at the lexicon:
- F2 = triangle
- G3 = green
- H4 = bottom-right

This combination is already in the lexicon as "F2-G3-H4": "triangle, green, bottom-right"

F2-G3-H4
